raised-doughnuts.name: Raised Doughnuts
instructions: Dissolve yeast and 1 teaspoon white sugar in 1/2 cup warm water in a small bowl. Let stand until it forms a creamy foam layer on top, 5 to 10 minutes.
Heat milk and vegetable shortening in a small saucepan over medium-low heat until shortening melted and tiny bubbles appear around edges. Remove from heat.
Place 1/4 cup white sugar and salt into the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment; add milk mixture. Beat on low speed until sugar is just dissolved; let stand until warm.
Beat in 1 cup flour, yeast mixture, and eggs on low speed until smooth. Gradually beat in remaining 3 cups flour until forms a soft dough.
Continue beating dough on low speed until it pulls away from the sides of the bowl, 2 to 3 minutes.
Turn out dough onto a well-floured work surface; knead until smooth and elastic, 2 to 3 minutes.
Form dough into a ball; place into a large greased bowl and grease top of dough. Cover the bowl with waxed paper and let dough rise a warm place until doubled in volume, 1 to 1 1/2 hours.

Punch down dough; roll out on a floured work surface until 1/2-inch thick. Cut out doughnuts with a 3 1/2-inch round doughnut cutter with a 1-inch center cutter. Let doughnuts rise on the work surface until very light and fluffy, 40 to 60 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep fryer or large saucepan to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Gently pick up and carefully drop doughnuts into the hot oil in batches of 2 or 3; fry until light golden brown, flipping once, about 2 minutes. Repeat with remaining doughnuts.
Transfer doughnuts to paper towels to drain.
Combine 1 tablespoon warm water and vanilla extract in a bowl; stir in confectioners' sugar to make the glaze. Spread a thin layer of glaze over warm doughnuts.

raspberry-jam-without-pectin.name: Raspberry Jam Without Pectin
instructions: Bring raspberries to a boil in a very large pot. Cook for 4 minutes. Add sugar and lemon juice; stir well. Bring back to a boil, stirring constantly. Cook for another 4 minutes.

Remove pot from heat and divide jam into sterilized jars, leaving 1/4-inch of space at the top. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any food residue. Top with lids, and screw on rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil, then carefully lower the jars into the pot using a holder, leaving a 2-inch space between the jars. Pour in more boiling water if necessary until the water level is at least 1 inch above the tops of the jars. Bring the water to a full boil, cover the pot, and process for 10 minutes.
Remove the jars from the stockpot and let rest, several inches apart, for 8 hours. Store in a cool, dark area.

reachable-argiro.name: Reachable
instructions: We'll use uncooked chickpeas and grind them into small pieces, not to become dust. Place them in a bowl.
Heat the water with the leaves until they come to a boiling point and withdraw. Let it become lukewarm and perfumed.
Remove the leaves and when the water comes to a temperature of 35

Cover very well and leave in a warm protected spot until the surface is foamed and fermented. If the atmosphere is warm this happens in about 6-7 hours. Otherwise we let him stand until he foams. Sometimes maybe more than 10 hours.
It is essential that water does not have chlorine because it prevents fermentation and destroys yeasts.
When the dough foams, put it in a large dough bowl.
Add 1 litre of lukewarm water (without chlorine) and flour until a thin dough is formed.
We cover very well not to take air and cover with thick cloth.
We create a warm environment and let the “Kunnos” intrude.
Leave the rabbit in a warm place without moving the pelvis for about 3 hours until the dough is puffed up and worked.

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-garlic-and-.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo en salsa de ajo y vino blanco
instructions: Sazona con sal y pimienta los muslos de pollo.
Warm a frying pan or plate with olive oil. When at temperature, start to glow his thighs for about 10 minutes from each side.
Meanwhile, pits onion and garlic teeth. Cut into small cubes and reserve.
Warm up a frying pan with oil and pits onion and garlic teeth for two minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste. Also add powder garlic and oregan. That's a good mix.
Vierte el vino blanco, mezcla y baja el fuego. Cocina hasta que el alcohol se evapore un poco.
Finally, add the Dijon mustard and mix.
Incorporates the roasted thighs into the frying pan, bathe them with the sauce and ends up cooking for about 7 minutes.
Turn off, let them rest and serve their thighs with the sauce. Enjoy!

recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-honey-musta.name: Recipe For Chicken Thighs In Honey Mustard Sauce
recipe-for-chicken-thighs-in-honey-musta.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo en salsa de mostaza y miel

ingredients.item: 8 chicken thighs (with no skin for a lighter choice)
1 / 2 cup of cooking cream (optional for more creamy texture)

instructions: Clean the chicken thighs and season them with salt and pepper to taste.
In a large frying pan, heat up olive oil and seal his thighs with medium-high heat till they are golden from both sides. Take them back and put them back.
In the same frying pan, add onion and garlic and cook them till they are soft and translucent.
Incorpora la mostaza y la miel, mezclando bien para combinar los sabores.
Turn the chicken thighs back to the frying pan and add the chicken stock.
Cover the frying pan and cook with medium to low heat for 25-30 minutes, or until the thighs are well cooked and the sauce has been slightly reduced.
If you want a more creamy texture, add the cooking cream in the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Mezcla suavemente para integrar la crema sin deshacer el pollo.
Serve the thighs with salsa and decorate with fresh parsley.

recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.name: Recipes For Grilled Chicken Breasts with Sautéed Spinach
recipe-for-grilled-chicken-breasts-with-.original_name: Receta de pechugas de pollo a la plancha con espinacas salteadas

ingredients.item: 2  pechugas de pollo deshuesadas y sin piel  ((aprox. 150 g cada una))
1 cda de aceite de oliva ( virgen extra)
1  diente de ajo picado muy fino

instructions: In a bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, mustard, pimenton, salt, pepper and rosemary.
Add chicken breasts and make sure they are well covered by the marinade.
Cover and let stand in the refrigerator for at least 20 minutes (you can leave up to 12 hours for more flavour).
Warm a non-stick frying pan or plate with medium to high heat.
It cooks the breasts 4 to 5 minutes per side, or until they are gilded out and completely cooked inside (internal temperature of 74-3).
Retira del fuego, tapa y deja reposar 3 minutos antes de cortar. Esto mantiene los jugos dentro.
In another frying pan, heat olive oil with medium heat.
Add garlic to sheets and pits till slightly golden.
Add the spinach little by little, stirring till they reduce its size.
Cooking for 2-3 minutes, sauona with salt, pepper and a touch of balsamic vinegar or lemon just before serving.
Sirve una cama de espinacas salteadas en el plato.
Coloca encima la pechuga cortada en tiras o entera.
You can decorate with roasted sesame seeds, salt scales and some drops of extra virgin olive oil for a gourmet final touch.

instructions: Peel the potatoes, carrots, onions and garlic, cut the potatoes and carrots into pieces and pinch the onions and garlic. Get the kale and cut in thick julian.
Lay some olive oil on a pot, light the fire and add the onions, garlic, carrots, potatoes and beans. Shake it and let it saute a little.
Cover with water, season with salt and let cook for about 15 minutes. Then add the cabbage and let it boil. Retrieve the spices and serve hot.

red-velvet-cake-argiro.name: Red Velvet Cake

ingredients.item: 4 tbs.fresh red color pastry (or 30 g. colour in jelly form)
4 tbs.fresh red color pastry (or 30 g. colour in jelly form)

instructions: Preheat the oven to 160°C in the air.
Butter 2 baking pans 22 cm and spread parchment paper at their base.
Shake the flour, cocoa, baking soda and salt in a bowl and add the sugar and mix with a spoon.
In another bowl, beat the 2 eggs with wire to fluffy and take some volume.
Add all other liquid ingredients, sunflower oil, sour milk, vinegar, vanilla, color and wire mix them well.
Finally, add the liquid ingredients into the bowl with the solids and mix with wire to homogenize.
Keep in mind that the red color after baking the cake will become 2-3 tons darker than it is in the raw mixture before baking.
Balance the mixture in two baking pans and bake on the medium grill without opening the oven for about 30 minutes.
We're checking to see if they were baked, entering the blade from a knife downtown. If it comes out dry, it's ready.
Allow them to stand for 10 minutes on the baking pans and carefully dissipate them on a grill to cool completely. Finally remove the parchment paper.
At this stage, after the red cake is completely cooked and cooled, we can wrap it well with membrane and keep it in the refrigerator for several days and in the freezer for several weeks.
The day I need it, I defrost it to come to room temperature and garnish it with its cream.
Red velvet, ready, covered with its frosting, is kept in the refrigerator for 2 days.
Before serving, let it come to room temperature.

red-ribbon-roasted-salsa.name: Red-ribbon Roasted Salsa
instructions: Fill a saucepan with water, stir in dried chipotle peppers, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer until peppers are soft, about 30 minutes. Drain and let cool. When peppers are cool, remove stems, cut open peppers, and remove seeds. Set peppers aside.
Preheat an outdoor grill for high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Grill tomatoes on hot grate until skin blackens and begins to peel, turning tomatoes often to blacken all sides, about 10 minutes. Set grilled tomatoes aside to cool.
Place grilled tomatoes, chipotle peppers, yellow onion, white vinegar, salt, black pepper, and lime juice into a food processor; pulse a few times, then process until almost pureed.
Refrigerate until flavors have blended, at least 2 hours to overnight.

ree-drummonds-marga-ree-ta.name: Ree Drummond's Marga-ree-ta
instructions: Shake sugar and water in a Mason jar until sugar dissolves.
Run lime wedge around the rim of a glass; dip rim in a dish of salt.

Put cilantro, 2 sprigs mint, and 3 cucumber slices in a cocktail shaker. Add sugar mixture, tequila, lime juice, lemon juice, and vodka. Mash mixture with a muddler or wooden spoon until herbs are broken up and flavors are released, about 15 seconds. Add ice to fill; cover and shake vigorously for 10 seconds.
Fill prepared glass with fresh ice and arrange remaining 4 cucumber slices inside. Strain drink into glass and garnish with mint sprig.

reuben-nachos.name: Reuben Nachos
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Mix together mayonnaise, ketchup, sour cream, relish, red onion, Dijon mustard, and garlic salt in a small bowl until well blended. Set sauce aside.
Layer 1/2 of the tortilla chips in an even layer on a baking sheet. Top with 1 cup Swiss cheese, 1/2 cup Cheddar cheese, and 1/4 teaspoon dill. Repeat layers with remaining chips, cheeses, and dill.
Bake in the preheated oven until cheeses are melted, about 5 minutes. Remove from the oven. Set an oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Top nachos evenly with corned beef and sauerkraut.
Cook under the preheated broiler until heated through, 1 to 2 minutes. Top nachos with sauce to serve.

rib-eye-steaks-with-garbanzo-and-green-b.name: Rib-eye Steaks With Garbanzo And Green Bean Salad

ingredients.item: -ounce package trimmed haricots verts or trimmed slender green beans

instructions: Cook haricots verts in large nonstick skillet of boiling salted water until crisp-tender, 2 to 3 minutes. Drain. Transfer to large bowl. Add garbanzos and onion. Reserve skillet.
Whisk 3 tablespoons oil, vinegar, and lemon peel in small bowl to blend. Add dressing to bean mixture and toss to coat. Stir in cilantro. Season with salt and pepper.

Sprinkle mesquite seasoning and chili powder over both sides of steaks, then sprinkle with salt and pepper. Heat remaining 1 tablespoon oil in reserved skillet over medium heat. Add steaks to skillet and cook to desired doneness, 5 to 6 minutes per side for medium-rare.
Divide salad among 4 plates. Slice steaks crosswise; divide among plates.

rice-crispy-ooh-la-llama-ice-cream-sandw.name: Rice Crispy Ooh La Llama Ice Cream Sandwiches

ingredients.item: Kroger® brand deluxe ooh la llama ice cream

instructions: Line an 8” square baking dish with parchment paper.
In a medium pot, melt the butter over medium heat. Continue cooking until foamy and light brown in color, 4–6 minutes.
Stir in marshmallows and salt until melted.
Pour mixture over rice cereal in a bowl and mix until fully combined, then add the sprinkles.
Working quickly, add half the rice mixture to the prepared pan, using a rubber spatula to press down in an even layer.
Dollop the Kroger® Brand Deluxe Ooh La Llama Ice Cream on top and smooth into an even layer.
Working quickly, add the remaining rice cereal mixture and press down with a spatula into an even layer.
Transfer to the freezer for 6 hours, or until firm.
Cut the ice cream sandwiches into 9 squares.
Serve immediately or freeze in Kroger® Brand Reclosable Colorful Assorted Sandwich Bags for up to 1 week.
Enjoy!

rice-pilaf.name: Rice Pilaf
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Melt butter and oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion; cook and stir until lightly browned, 7 to 8 minutes. Remove from the heat.
Place rice into a 9x13-inch casserole dish. Add onion and stir until rice is thoroughly coated. Place the dish on a baking sheet.
Combine chicken stock, salt, cayenne pepper, and saffron in a saucepan. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Pour stock mixture over rice in the baking dish and stir to combine. Spread mixture evenly along the bottom of the pan and cover tightly with heavy-duty aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to rest, covered, for 10 minutes. Remove the foil and fluff rice with a fork.

rice-with-artichokes-and-clams-tradition.name: Rice With Artichokes And Clams (traditional Recipe)
rice-with-artichokes-and-clams-tradition.original_name: Arroz con alcachofas y almejas (receta tradicional)
instructions: Before we start cooking, it's important to clear clams and artichokes well. To clear the clams, you simply have to put them in water with salt for a few hours to put them down. To clear the artichokes, you have to remove the outside leaves and cut them from the remaining leaves. Then cut the artichokes in half, remove the "beard" from the heart and cut them into quarters.
In a large pan, it heats 4 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil with medium heat. Add minced onion, minced red pepper and minced garlic and cold till tender.
Add the artichokes to the casserole and skip them for a few minutes till they are golden. Then add the rice and mix well so that it impregnates from the taste of the vegetables.
Add hot fish and saffron in strands to the casserole and remove well. Let everything boil for a few minutes with medium-high fire.
Put the fire to a minimum and add clams to the casserole. Cover the casserole and let the rice be cooked for about 15- 20 minutes, or until tender and broth have been absorbed.
Once the rice's ready, put out the fire and let the pan stand for a few minutes. Sprinkle with minced parsley before serving.

rigatoni-with-fennel-and-anchovies.name: Rigatoni With Fennel And Anchovies
instructions: Remove tough outer layers and fronds from fennel bulbs and discard. Working one at a time, cut bulbs lengthwise (through root ends) into quarters, remove cores, and slice quarters lengthwise into ½"-thick wedges.

Heat oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over high until shimmering. Add fennel to pot, arranging in as even a layer as possible. Season with salt and cook, undisturbed, until golden brown underneath and starting to soften, 6–8 minutes. Using tongs, turn fennel over and cook until golden brown on the other side, 6–8 minutes.

Reduce heat to low and add anchovies, garlic, red pepper flakes, and ½ cup mint to pot. Cook, stirring often, until anchovies are disintegrated and garlic is golden, about 2 minutes. Remove pot from heat and finely grate zest of orange and lemon directly into hot oil; stir well to evenly distribute. Cover pot to keep sauce warm and let sit until pasta is done.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until al dente. Drain pasta, reserving 1½ cups pasta cooking liquid.

Uncover sauce, add pasta and 1 cup reserved pasta cooking liquid, and set over medium-low heat. Add Pecorino and cook, tossing vigorously and adding more pasta cooking liquid if needed, until sauce is emulsified and pasta is coated, about 2 minutes.
Divide pasta among bowls and top with torn mint.

risotto-with-butternut-squash-leeks-and-.name: Risotto With Butternut Squash, Leeks, And Basil

ingredients.prep: white and pale green parts only

ingredients.item: Freshly grated parmesan cheese plus additional

instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large pot over medium-high heat. Add squash and sauté until beginning to soften and brown around edges, about 5 minutes. Transfer squash to medium bowl.

Reduce heat to medium; add remaining 1 tablespoon oil, leeks, and thyme to same pot and stir until tender but not brown, about 5 minutes. Add rice and stir 1 minute. Add 1 cup broth and simmer until absorbed, stirring frequently, 3 to 4 minutes. Add remaining broth by ½ cupfuls, allowing each addition to be absorbed before adding next, stirring often, about 15 minutes. Return squash to pot. Continue to cook until rice is just tender but still very creamy, stirring gently and often, about 10 minutes longer (about 25 minutes total cooking time). Remove from heat. Stir in basil and ¾ cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Transfer to large bowl and serve with additional Parmesan cheese.

risotto-with-mushrooms-and-fresh-cream-c.name: Risotto With Mushrooms And Fresh Cream Cheese
risotto-with-mushrooms-and-fresh-cream-c.original_name: Κλασικό ριζότο µε μανιτάρια και φρέσκο τυρί κρέμα
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a deep pan with a thick base.
Sauté the onion over medium to high heat for 2 minutes and add the price to mix quickly, to oil well and become transparent (for 3 minutes).
Add the garlic and mushrooms.
Continue the sautéing for 2 more minutes and add the wine.
Leave until it is absorbed and then start adding warm broth (or water) a little bit at a time, so that the liquids are absorbed each time before adding the next.
Add the nutmeg, add the salt, pepper and continue to mix regularly for 15 minutes.
Finally, turn off the fire and add the cream and parmesan.
Mix very well and serve immediately on shallow dishes (to stop boiling immediately).

roast-lamb-recipe-comedera.name: Roast Lamb Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  paletilla de cordero de un kilo a kilo y medio

instructions: To start with, we'll get the plate out of the oven to use as a base for the lamb. Then we'll purify the oven at 180 degrees Celsius.
Antes de comenzar a trabajar la carne, pelaremos los dientes de ajo y los trituraremos, o en su defecto, los picaremos finamente.
Aprovecharemos para pelar las cebollas y picarlas en aros.
Yo recomiendo engrasar la superficie de la bandeja del horno, antes de colocar el cordero sobre ella. Luego, colocaremos la paletilla ya limpia, y sazonaremos con sal y pimienta al gusto.

The following will be to cover the meat with an oil chorrit. At the fingertips we will massage the flesh to spread the oil onto the whole surface, mixed with the salt and pepper we have added earlier.
We will soon spread the garlic, distributed equally above all the lamb. We will massage slightly again to stick to the surface and impregnate with the oil we have added earlier.
Coronaremos el cordero con los aros de cebolla y espolvorearemos con una cucharadita de hierbas provenzales.
We'll have the lamb with the wine and we'll make sure that she's also wet her onions.
Luego, llevaremos la bandeja al horno precalentado, y dejaremos que el cordero se cocine durante 60 minutos para un cordero de un kilo, o 90 minutos para un cordero de kilo y medio.

10. At half the cooking time, we will come back to the oven to turn the meat and bath it with the cooking fluid (the wine plus the juice that lays off the meat). If more fluids are needed, we can add some water.

11. After cooking time, we'll get back up the oven temperature at 220 degrees. We'll also turn the lamb back and water with the juice or stock that's on the plate again. Once again, if we have to have some water, we can add some water.
12. We'll let the lamb cook another 20 minutes, so that the skin gets golden and a little crispy (if you wish, you can come back to half this additional time to get back and water the flesh).
13. That's all. After this time, the lamb will be ready to cut and serve.

roasted-acorn-squash-with-chile-vinaigre.name: Roasted Acorn Squash With Chile Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: To 2 teaspoons finely chopped fresh hot red chile

instructions: Put oven racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat oven to 450F. Halve squash lengthwise, then cut off and discard stem ends. Scoop out seeds and cut squash lengthwise into 3/4-inch-wide wedges. Toss squash with black pepper, 3/4 teaspoon salt, and 2 tablespoons oil in a bowl, then arrange, cut sides down, in 2 large shallow baking pans. Roast squash, switching position of pans halfway through roasting, until squash is tender and undersides of wedges are golden brown, 25 to 35 minutes.

While squash roasts, mince garlic and mash to a paste with remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt. Transfer paste to a small bowl and whisk in lime juice, chile (to taste), cilantro, and remaining 1/4 cup oil until combined. Transfer squash, browned sides up, to a platter and drizzle with vinaigrette.

roasted-butternut-squash.name: Roasted Butternut Squash
instructions: Preheat oven to 450°.
Toss squash and oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt and pepper.
Roast, tossing occasionally, until tender and browned, 35–45 minutes.

roasted-cabbage-and-apples-with-italian-.name: Roasted Cabbage And Apples With Italian Sausage
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Toss cabbage, onion, apple, thyme sprigs, vinegar, 1 Tbsp. oil, and 1/4 cup water in a 13x9" baking dish; season with salt and pepper and roast, covered, until cabbage is wilted and softened, 35–45 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Cook sausages until browned and cooked through, 10–12 minutes. Add to cabbage during last 10 minutes of cooking, tossing to coat. Serve with bread.

roasted-carrots-with-stracciatella-and-b.name: Roasted Carrots With Stracciatella And Buckwheat

ingredients.prep: a pungent peppery seed also known as kolonji or black onion seeds, can be found at Indian markets and some supermarkets, or online.

instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Toss carrots with 1 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with salt. Roast, tossing occasionally, until golden brown and tender, 15–20 minutes. Let cool.
Meanwhile, toast buckwheat in a dry small skillet over medium-high heat, tossing often, until fragrant, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a small bowl and stir in nigella seeds, if using.
Place vinegar in a medium bowl and mix in carrot juice, if using. Add carrots and toss to coat. Season with salt.
Place stracciatella on a platter. Arrange carrots over cheese, top with herbs and buckwheat mixture, and drizzle with oil.
Do Ahead: Carrots can be roasted 6 hours ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Bring to room temperature before tossing with vinaigrette.

roasted-cauliflower-steaks.name: Roasted Cauliflower 'steaks

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil.

Place cauliflower onto a cutting board with stem-side facing up; cut vertically into 4 evenly thick steaks. Arrange steaks onto the prepared baking sheet. Drizzle olive oil over steaks; season with garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, flip with a spatula, and continue to roast until soft in the middle and darkening around edges, about 15 minutes more.

roasted-okra-with-garlic-recipe-lezzet.name: Roasted Okra With Garlic Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tsp of lemon juice (for optional, sumxüz stay)
Instead of fresh bamya you can use delicious bam, but roasting is necessary to slightly increase the feed.
A similar roasting can be made with fresh beans or pumpkin if you want a different vegetable instead.
Fresh garlic can be used instead of garlic powder or canned crushed garlic.
A lighter aroma for can reduce the amount of vegetables.
Instead of olive oil, you can use lube oil, butter or avocado oil.
You can use minimal fat and roast in the oven.
Apart from salt and pepper, you can create different flavors with pepper, red pepper, thyme or sumac.
Instead of lemon juice you can get a different taste using delicate sour or apple vinegar.
If you don’t want to use onion you can delete it or add a different flavor by adding instead.
During the service you can increase the visualness by adding fresh parsley, derelate or min.

instructions: 1. Wash the leg and dry.
2. If you are using onion, light-and-gray in fine chopping olive oil.
3. Add garlic and roast 1-2 minutes, then add bamians.
4. Blend 8-10 minutes in medium fire.
5. For lushshort fire in fire.
6. Tuz, karabiber ekleyin.
7. Take a little lemon juice depending on the request, so the bamya is unslimated.
8. Serve hot.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

roasted-potatoes-recipe-in-air-fryer-com.name: Roasted Potatoes Recipe In Air Fryer
roasted-potatoes-recipe-in-air-fryer-com.original_name: Receta de papas asadas en airfryer

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de romero seco o fresco picado

instructions: Wash well the potatoes and, if you wish, press them (although the skin adds an extra flavour and nutrients).
Cut potatoes into cubes about 2-3 cm in size to ensure a uniform cooking.
Put the potatoes into a big bowl and add olive oil, salt, pepper, garlic powder and rosemary. Mix well so that potatoes are well covered with condiments.
To purify the Airfryer to 180 been 3 been (177 been 3) for about 3-5 minutes.
It puts the potatoes into an Airfryer basket into a single layer and avoid overloading them to allow a uniform cooking.
Cooking the potatoes for 20-25 minutes, stirring the basket at half the cooking time to make sure that all pieces are cooked uniformly and crisp throughout.

rose-water-shortbread.name: Rose Water Shortbread
instructions: Whisk salt and 2 cups flour in a medium bowl. Using an electric mixer on high speed, beat butter and ¾ cup sugar until well combined (butter does not need to be fluffy), about 3 minutes. Beat in egg. Reduce speed to low and gradually mix in dry ingredients. Divide dough in half and pat into two ¾"-thick disks; wrap in plastic. Chill at least 2 hours and up to 1 day.
Whisk remaining ¼ cup sugar with ¼ cup hot water in a bowl until sugar is dissolved. Stir in rose water; set aside.

Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Working one at a time, let dough disks sit at room temperature about 5 minutes to soften slightly. Roll out on a lightly floured sheet of parchment paper, dusting with more flour and chilling to firm if it becomes too hard to work with, until about ⅛" thick. Punch out cookies with cutter; transfer to parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing 1" apart. Gently press 3 pistachios into each cookie. (Bonus: Snack on any leftover pistachios.)
Bake cookies until golden brown, 10–12 minutes. Let cool 5 minutes; lightly brush with reserved rose water mixture (you won’t use all of it). Let cool completely.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 month ahead. Freeze instead of chilling.

roumelian-egg-pie-argiro.name: Roumelian Egg Pie
instructions: Beat eggs with milk and 1/2 cup olive oil first.
We rub pepper.
We'll use a 34 or 36 million baking pan.
We oil it, spread the first piece of land slightly surred (to be prominent from the walls).
Sprinkle with some oil.
Lay the second leaf slightly overturned (extend from the walls).
We make a layer of half the cheese and pour half the liquid.
Spread the third sheet and sprinkle with oil.
Make a layer of the remaining cheeses and add the remaining egg mixture.
Lay the fourth sheet.
Add the remaining cheeses and other liquids (milk and egg).
Cover the pie with the other two sheets oiled and slightly wrinkled.
Turn inside and turn the edges.
Allow the pie to stand for 15-20 minutes.
We drill her surface with a knife.
Add the remaining olive oil.
Bake it in a well preheated oven in the lower resistance for 30 minutes and then in the upper and lower resistance for about 40 minutes, until golden.

rum-club-daiquiri.name: Rum Club Daiquiri
instructions: Combine aged rum, fresh lime juice, demerara syrup, maraschino liqueur, bitters and Herbsaint in a cocktail shaker and shake with ice until well chilled. Double-strain into a chilled coupe and serve up.

rye-and-caraway-crackers.name: Rye And Caraway Crackers

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Grind caraway seeds in spice mill or with mortar and pestle until coarsely ground. Transfer to a food processor. Add all-purpose flour, oil, rye flour, and kosher salt and process to combine. With the motor running, pour in ¼ cup water and continue to process until mixture resembles wet sand.

Transfer dough a clean work surface and knead until smooth, about 2 minutes. Roll out dough until you can almost see through it (about 14x9"). Transfer to a parchment-lined rimmed baking sheet. Dough might be an irregular shape, but that’s fine; just trim any excess so it fits on sheet. Sprinkle dough with sea salt.
Bake cracker until golden brown, 14–16 minutes. Let cool before breaking into irregular pieces.
